title: Enchanted Relics
description: Find Relics while exploring & get random Enchantments!
body: ![Enchanted Relics Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dee160968b33a5e1f841b32381b4db404c0cdf27.png) ## Find Enchanted Relics all over the worlds, get random Enchantments! ### Features: - Enchanted Relics spawn in surface area of all vanilla dimensions; Overworld, Nether, End. - Right click on the Relic with a Book to get a random Enchantment. - More interesting features & updates are planned! But it will take some time to add. ![Gap 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bf249aa8cad733fb6ca4f4f07d8754a0a80f8be.png) ☕I will appreciate any amount of donation support to keep my modding work ongoing!☕ ![Gap 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bf249aa8cad733fb6ca4f4f07d8754a0a80f8be.png) ## Q&A: - Q) Where and how can I find the Relics? - A: Relics are generated on overworld surfaces; but not on ocean or surfaces. - Q) How can I get Enchantments form the Relics? - A: Get a Book on main hand -> right click on the Relic -> get a random Enchantment! - Q) Will this mod be available for old Minecraft versions? - A: No, I'm not porting this mod for below 1.20.1 versions. ## Latest Changes: - **v1.3** - Fixed: spawn rate - Fixed: relics not working - Fixed: relics should no longer spawn on water biomes anymore (not tested)
